Why Us

Why Choose Our Product?

🌿

100% Natural

Made from fresh herbs only. No synthetic ingredients, no harmful chemicals — just pure nature.

🧪

No Extracts Used

Whole, pure herbs without artificial extracts or additives for maximum effectiveness.

🏅

GMP Certified Unit

Manufactured in a certified facility that follows strict quality and safety standards.

♻️

BPA-Free Packaging

Packed in safe, toxin-free packaging to protect your health and the environment.

Science

Why It Works

1

Natural Ayurvedic Ingredients

Time-tested herbs known to support vitality, metabolism, and overall wellness.

2

Scientifically Backed Formula

Developed with expert input and modern research to maximize absorption and results.

3

No Side Effects

Free from harmful chemicals and artificial additives — safe for long-term use.

4

Holistic Health Benefits

Improves your body's natural balance from within, not just surface-level symptoms.

How to Use

Dosage Instructions

💊

Private Knight Capsules

Take 1–2 capsules daily with warm milk or water. Best taken after meals for optimal absorption.

🫙

Private Knight Oil

Apply a few drops and massage gently for 5–10 minutes. Use regularly for best visible results.

📍 Kolkata, WB
★★★★★
sotti bolte prothome bisshwas hoyni .. onloine eto product dekhi shob voya mone hoy . kintu bondhur kotha y ei combo order korlam . 3 shoptaho pore bujhte parcchi . energy onek berecche , ar klanti ager moto nei . packeging ekdom sadamata chilo barie keu bujhte i pareni 😄 abar order korbo

★★★★★
